title: Enable versions.test.fidl test
description: This will require implementation of the FIDL versioning system. First port the fidlc/src/versioning_types.(h|cc) code and then look through the fidlc/src/(availability|consume|replacement|resolve)_step.* files.

title: Un-ignore tests in attributes_tests.rs
description: The initial port of attributes_tests.cc left many tests disabled. We should investigate and fix the compiler to un-ignore these tests.

title: Port availability_step for versioning
description: Port fidlc/src/availability_step.(h|cc) to fidlcrs to populate Availability structs for all AST nodes.

title: Port handle_tests.cc to Rust
description: Port fidlc/tests/handle_tests.cc to src/handle_tests.rs. When the tests are ported, if they don't pass they can be marked `#[ignore]` to skip.

title: Port fidlc/tests/test_library.(cc|h)
description:
This test library class is used extensively in the C++ fidlc implementation to test compiler features.

I'd like to have you port some of the tests next, but hte first step is to port the test library over.

title: Add struct validations to compiler to unignore structurally failing tests
description: Implement missing error validations in compiler.rs (like cyclic recursion checks, member type validity, inline size checks etc) so that structs_tests.rs can be fully unignored.

title: Port method_tests.cc to Rust
description: Port fidlc/tests/method_tests.cc to src/method_tests.rs. When ported, failing tests can be marked with #[ignore].

title: make nullable test pass
description: The `nullable.test.fidl` golden test currently fails when uncommented in `generate-goldens.sh`. Implement correct parsing and compilation support for nullable modifiers (e.g. `MyStruct? ` or `vector<T>:?`) inside fidlcrs.

title: Implement compile-time checks for bits declarations
description: Currently many tests in bits_tests.rs are ignored because fidlcrs lacks layout and type validation for bits. Implement validations for power of two values, overlapping mask flags, duplicate member names, nullable layout bounds, incorrect negative values for unsigned primitives, etc in `compile_bits` to unignore the failing bad tests.

title: Implement compile-time checks for protocol declarations
description: Currently many tests in protocol_tests.rs are ignored because fidlcrs does not run validation checks on protocol declarations like duplicate methods, strict/flexible modifiers in wrong positions, invalid request/response argument layout rules, payload struct constraints, etc. Implement these compiler diagnostics within compile_step.rs.

title: Port utils_tests.cc to Rust
description: Port fidlc/tests/utils_tests.cc to src/utils_tests.rs. When the tests are ported, if they don't pass they can be marked `#[ignore]` to skip.

description: Port fidlc/tests/versioning_types_tests.cc to src/versioning_types_tests.rs. When the tests are ported, if they don't pass they can be marked `#[ignore]` to skip.

title: Fix failing tests in alias_tests.rs
description: Many tests ported from 'alias_tests.cc' to 'alias_tests.rs' are currently failing and marked as #[ignore]. We need to fix the compiler's handling of aliases to make these tests pass. E.g. fix 'good_primitive', 'bad_cannot_null_twice', 'bad_duplicate_alias', etc.

title: Port all diagnostics over from fidlc/src/diagnostics.h
description: if any of them aren't in use yet they can be marked to allow them to be unused.

title: Turn compare-generation.sh into a Rust test
description:
Convert the compare-generation.sh script into a Rust test that's run as part of `cargo test`. It should either invoke the fidlcrs binary or call into the entry-point that main() uses.

When there's a golden mismatch a diff should be shown.

title: Validate --name flag
description: The command-line interface now accepts a `--name LIBRARY_NAME` argument. Add validation in fidlcrs to check if the main compiled library actually matches `expected_library_name`. Ensure errors properly reflect mismatches, identical to the C++ fidlc compiler.

title: Port alias_tests.cc to Rust
description: Port fidlc/tests/alias_tests.cc to src/alias_tests.rs. When the tests are ported, if they don't pass they can be marked #[ignore] to skip.

title: Implement compile-time checks for Service constraints
description: Port validation logic for Services from C++ fidlc to Rust. This includes checking for conflicting members, preventing nullable protocol members, ensuring only protocol (client ends) are present, banning use of Services inside other decls (like Structs), and restricting to a single protocol transport kind. Un-ignore the relevant tests in src/service_tests.rs once implemented.

title: Port versioning_replacement_tests.cc to Rust
description: Port fidlc/tests/versioning_replacement_tests.cc to src/versioning_replacement_tests.rs. When the tests are ported, if they don't pass they can be marked `#[ignore]` to skip.

title: Port resource_tests.cc to Rust
description: Port fidlc/tests/resource_tests.cc to src/resource_tests.rs. When the tests are ported, if they don't pass they can be marked `#[ignore]` to skip.

title: Port steps architecture from C++
description:
The C++ fidlc implementation in fidlc/src/ implements the compiler in terms of several "steps". The Compiler::Compile() method in fidlc/src/compiler.cc calls each of the steps in a particular order.

Update this Rust implementation, fidlcrs, to follow this same pattern. This may mean moving code that's currently directly on the Compiler struct into separate step structs. Features that are not yet supported fidlcrs don't need to be ported over, but put the structure in place so that they can be added later. In fact, if you notice them add thicket tickets to track that work with details you come across.

As you develop, keep running "cargo check" and "./generate_goldens.sh" to ensure that we move the structure of the program forward without losing ground on features. Don't enable any additional files in the generate_goldens.sh script - if you need broader tests then file a ticket and we'll come back to it later.

title: Evaluate identifier constants properly in compile_constant
Port versioning_overlap_tests.cc to Rust
description: Port fidlc/tests/versioning_overlap_tests.cc to src/versioning_overlap_tests.rs. When the tests are ported, if they don't pass they can be marked `#[ignore]` to skip.

title: Replace custom 1000+ error constants with official fidlc diagnostics
description: The compiler currently relies on bespoke constants >=1000 (e.g. ERR_ARRAY_CONSTRAINT, ERR_EXPECTED_VALUE, ERR_MEMBER_OVERFLOW, ERR_DUPLICATE_METHOD_NAME) rather than their accurately ported counterparts (e.g. ERR_NAME_COLLISION). Identify the equivalent ported constants (ID < 1000) for all these temporary placeholders and update compiler.rs, parser.rs, etc. Remove the 1000+ definitions after replacement.

title: Port reporter_tests.cc to Rust
description: Port fidlc/tests/reporter_tests.cc to src/reporter_tests.rs. When the tests are ported, if they don't pass they can be marked `#[ignore]` to skip.

title: Fix compiler warnings in main.rs and cli.rs
description: The fidlcrs build currently outputs many warnings about unused variables and mutable variables not mutating. Clean these up to keep the console output clean.

title: Fix handle type validations to unignore handle_tests
description: Currently, the FIDL compiler in Rust does not fully validate handle subtypes (e.g. THREAD, PROCESS) and rights (e.g. DUPLICATE, TRANSFER) correctly, and simply ignores many invalid handle definitions. Update compiler.rs to correctly resolve handle constraints and enforce FIDL handle rules, so that the #[ignore] attribute can be removed from failing handle_tests.

title: Port generated_name_tests.cc to Rust
description: Port fidlc/tests/generated_name_tests.cc to src/generated_name_tests.rs. When the tests are ported, if they don't pass they can be marked `#[ignore]` to skip.

description: Port fidlc/tests/versioning_platform_tests.cc to src/versioning_platform_tests.rs. When the tests are ported, if they don't pass they can be marked `#[ignore]` to skip.

title: Port fidlc/tests/consts_tests.cc to Rust
description: Port consts_tests.cc to Rust using the new TestLibrary implementation.

title: Port errcat_good_tests.cc to Rust
description: Port fidlc/tests/errcat_good_tests.cc to src/errcat_good_tests.rs. When the tests are ported, if they don't pass they can be marked `#[ignore]` to skip.

title: More sophisticated goldens generation
description:
Look at how golden files are specified in fidlc/testdata/BUILD.gn and note how different test libraries are defined with different parameters.

In particular look at how the following variables vary based on which filenames are being generated:
 - public_deps
 - experimental_flags
 - versioned
 - contains drivers

Update generate-goldens.sh so that the same variables are set when we go to compile FIDL libraries. Don't worry about using these values yet.

title: Command-line interface
description: fidlcrs must implement the same command-line interface as fidlc. Look at the implementation in fidlc/cmd/fidlc/main.cc and implement the same interface in fidlcrs

title: Port ordinals_tests.cc to Rust
description: Port fidlc/tests/ordinals_tests.cc to src/ordinals_tests.rs. When the tests are ported, if they don't pass they can be marked `#[ignore]` to skip.

title: Port NamingContext logic from C++
description: Port the naming context logic from the C++ fidlc implementation. In particular there's logic in fidlc/src/name.cc fidlc/src/name.h and fidlc/src/consume_step.cc.

title: Un-ignore tests in types_tests.rs
description: Fix types_tests.rs disabled and un-ported tests. This includes porting the remaining static_asserts and expects into standard valid test conditions.

description: Port fidlc/tests/virtual_source_tests.cc to src/virtual_source_tests.rs. When the tests are ported, if they don't pass they can be marked `#[ignore]` to skip.

description: Port fidlc/tests/versioning_attribute_tests.cc to src/versioning_attribute_tests.rs. When the tests are ported, if they don't pass they can be marked `#[ignore]` to skip.

title: Implement compile-time checks for union declarations
description: Currently many tests in union_tests.rs are ignored because fidlcrs does not run validation checks on union declarations like missing explicit ordinals, ordinal uniqueness, out of bounds ordinals, union starting from 0, empty strict unions, inline layouts, etc. Implement these compiler diagnostics within compile_step.rs.

title: Port transport_tests.cc to Rust
description: Port fidlc/tests/transport_tests.cc to src/transport_tests.rs. When the tests are ported, if they don't pass they can be marked `#[ignore]` to skip.

title: Pass BUILD.gn variables to fidlcrs in generate-goldens.sh
description: Now that we extract variables like public_deps and experimental_flags in generate-goldens.sh, update the invocation to actually pass these flags to the fidlcrs executable. E.g. --experimental=allow_new_types, etc.

description: Port fidlc/tests/errors_tests.cc to src/errors_tests.rs. When the tests are ported, if they don't pass they can be marked `#[ignore]` to skip.

title: Port fidlc/tests/parsing_tests.cc to Rust
description: Port parsing_tests.cc to Rust using the new TestLibrary implementation.

title: Update parser to parse modifier attributes
description: Update fidlcrs parser to extract and preserve attributes attached to modifiers (e.g. strict(removed=3))

title: Port using_tests.cc to Rust
description: Port fidlc/tests/using_tests.cc to src/using_tests.rs. When ported, failing tests can be marked with #[ignore].

title: Port flat_ast_tests.cc to Rust
description: Port fidlc/tests/flat_ast_tests.cc to src/flat_ast_tests.rs. When the tests are ported, if they don't pass they can be marked `#[ignore]` to skip.

title: Support compiling multiple library dependencies via multiple --files flags
description: The CLI accepts multiple `--files` flags chunks representing dependency libraries in topological order. Currently fidlcrs flattens all files and merges them into the main library AST. It must instead maintain separate library structures, resolve external cross-referencing types across them, and output only the final main library AST while including dependency external types in `library_dependencies` and `external_struct_declarations`.

title: Port resource_tests.cc to Rust
description: Port fidlc/tests/resource_tests.cc to src/resource_tests.rs. When ported, failing tests can be marked with `#[ignore]`.

title: Port alias_tests.cc to Rust
description: Port fidlc/tests/alias_tests.cc to src/alias_tests.rs. When the tests are ported, if they don't pass they can be marked `#[ignore]` to skip.

title: Implement an error reporting mechanism
description: Currently, `compiler.rs` generates `unknown` synthetic types when a declaration isn't found, and it uses `panic!` in `resolve_type` for unsupported layouts. It silently ignores missing types with a commented out `eprintln!`. A proper diagnostic collection mechanism (similar to `fidlc`'s `Reporter->Fail`) should be implemented so that errors can be gathered and printed at the end.

title: Port direct_dependencies_tests.cc to Rust
description: Port fidlc/tests/direct_dependencies_tests.cc to src/direct_dependencies_tests.rs. When the tests are ported, if they don't pass they can be marked `#[ignore]` to skip.

description: Port fidlc/tests/types_tests.cc to src/types_tests.rs. When the tests are ported, if they don't pass they can be marked `#[ignore]` to skip.

description: The initial port of method_tests.cc left tests disabled if they were bad or complicated. Un-ignore these tests and fix the compiler to make them pass.

title: Port formatter_tests.cc to Rust
description: Port fidlc/tests/formatter_tests.cc to src/formatter_tests.rs. When the tests are ported, if they don't pass they can be marked `#[ignore]` to skip.

description: Port fidlc/tests/versioning_basic_tests.cc to src/versioning_basic_tests.rs. When the tests are ported, if they don't pass they can be marked `#[ignore]` to skip.

title: Port resourceness_tests.cc to Rust
description: Port fidlc/tests/resourceness_tests.cc to src/resourceness_tests.rs. When the tests are ported, if they don't pass they can be marked `#[ignore]` to skip.

title: Clean up LibraryDependency generation
description: The LibraryDependency generation in compiler.rs currently hardcodes the zx library declarations if any file contains 'using zx;'. This should be made more robust by correctly resolving and importing library declarations from actual .fidl files or a provided SDK.

title: Fix compiler warnings in main.rs and cli.rs
description: Address the remaining unused variables/mutability warnings in main.rs and cli.rs. E.g. _expected_platform, _warnings_as_errors, unused `arg` in main parser loop, etc.

title: Port handle_tests.cc to Rust
description: Port fidlc/tests/handle_tests.cc to src/handle_tests.rs. When ported, failing tests can be marked with `#[ignore]`.

title: Port lint_findings_tests.cc to Rust
description: Port fidlc/tests/lint_findings_tests.cc to src/lint_findings_tests.rs. When the tests are ported, if they don't pass they can be marked `#[ignore]` to skip.

title: Use argh for argument parsing
description: Use the argh crate to parse arguments rather than doing manual parsing in main.rs

title: Differentiate dependent libraries from the main library in arg parsing
description: Currently, `fidlcrs` gathers all source files from all `--files` chunks into a flat list before compiling them all at once. The FIDL compiler specification is that earlier `--files` chunks are libraries that the final `--files` chunk depends on. We need to distinguish these dependent libraries, only parsing them and treating them as external references when compiling the final source files as the main library.

title: Implement compile-time checks for struct declarations
description: Currently many tests in structs_tests.rs are failing or ignored. Implement strict layout checks, valid defaults checking, references checks for struct members.

title: Port string_array_tests.cc to Rust
description: Port fidlc/tests/string_array_tests.cc to src/string_array_tests.rs. When the tests are ported, if they don't pass they can be marked `#[ignore]` to skip.

title: Port using_tests.cc to Rust
description: Port fidlc/tests/using_tests.cc to src/using_tests.rs. When the tests are ported, if they don't pass they can be marked `#[ignore]` to skip.

title: Port recoverable_compilation_tests.cc to Rust
description: Port fidlc/tests/recoverable_compilation_tests.cc to src/recoverable_compilation_tests.rs. When the tests are ported, if they don't pass they can be marked `#[ignore]` to skip.

title: Fix has_padding mismatch for recursive types in typeshape_tests
description: In `typeshape_tests::tests`, several tests (e.g. `good_recursion_handles_bounded`, `good_recursive_union_and_struct`) are failing due to a `has_padding` mismatch for structs and unions involved in recursion. The recursive types evaluation needs to properly calculate `has_padding` based on the child types or itself.

title: Implement compile-time checks for array layouts
description: Currently many tests in array_tests.rs are marked as ignored because fidlcrs does not run layout validations for arrays to catch zero-sized arrays, missing array sizes, non-parameterized arrays, optional arrays, or arrays with multiple constraints. This ticket is for implementing these validations in compile_step.rs so that the bad array tests in array_tests.rs can be un-ignored and pass.

title: Implement protocol method request/response payload generation
description: The fidlcrs compiler currently compiles protocols but does not properly generate synthesized Request structs and Response unions for methods with payloads or errors (where `is_result` = true). Implement this so that golden tests don't have to test with protocol output ignored.

title: Port canonical_names_tests.cc to Rust
description: Port fidlc/tests/canonical_names_tests.cc to src/canonical_names_tests.rs. When the tests are ported, if they don't pass they can be marked `#[ignore]` to skip.

title: Implement complete validation for constants and parameters
description: Fix ignoring consts_tests where bit manipulation, constant ranges, bounds are not validated.

title: Port method_tests.cc to Rust
description: Port fidlc/tests/method_tests.cc to src/method_tests.rs. When the tests are ported, if they don't pass they can be marked `#[ignore]` to skip.

title: Port struct_tests.cc to Rust
description: Port fidlc/tests/struct_tests.cc to src/struct_tests.rs

title: Port fidlc/tests/structs_tests.cc to Rust
description: Port structs_tests.cc to Rust using the new TestLibrary implementation.

title: Port types_tests.cc to Rust
description: Port fidlc/tests/types_tests.cc to src/types_tests.rs. When ported, failing tests can be marked with #[ignore].

title: Un-ignore tests in using_tests.rs
description: The using tests check things like unused imports which aren't implemented cleanly. Go unignore and port those checks completely.

title: Fix resource type validations to unignore resource_tests
description: Currently, the FIDL compiler in Rust does not fully validate resource definitions properly, nor does it emit them within `JsonRoot::experimental_resource_declarations`. As a result, all `resource_tests` are marked with `#[ignore]`. Implement resource validations (e.g., checking it's derived from uint32, has valid subtype/rights, prevent duplicates) and populate the AST representations to pass these tests and remove `#[ignore]`.

title: Port table_tests.cc to Rust
description: Port fidlc/tests/table_tests.cc to src/table_tests.rs. When the tests are ported, if they don't pass they can be marked `#[ignore]` to skip.

title: Port fidlc/tests/bits_tests.cc to Rust
description: Port bits_tests.cc to Rust using the new TestLibrary implementation.

title: Actual parsing for available and versioned
description: The parser currently uses a fake parsing approach for --available and --versioned flags by just calling args.claim() and ignoring the value. Implement true parsing for these parameters per fidlc CLI specs.

title: Investigate union declaration order golden diff
description: The union.json golden file showed a change in declaration order after NamingContext refactoring. Verify if this change is correct and update the golden file if necessary.

title: Port service_tests.cc to Rust
description: Port fidlc/tests/service_tests.cc to src/service_tests.rs. When ported, failing tests can be marked with `#[ignore]`.

title: Fix has_padding in generated structs containing handles
description: The usage of protocol ends (zx.Handle) in structs seems to trigger padding=true in golden but false in generated. Check if 4-byte handles in 8-byte aligned structs cause padding.

title: Port flexible_tests.cc to Rust
description: Port fidlc/tests/flexible_tests.cc to src/flexible_tests.rs. When the tests are ported, if they don't pass they can be marked `#[ignore]` to skip.

title: Port recoverable_parsing_tests.cc to Rust
description: Port fidlc/tests/recoverable_parsing_tests.cc to src/recoverable_parsing_tests.rs. When the tests are ported, if they don't pass they can be marked `#[ignore]` to skip.

title: Support compiling multiple files per invocation
description: The command-line parser in src/main.rs now parses multiple files arguments from the `--files` flag, but the compiler itself only processes the first file. Extend fidlcrs to process all provided files and merge their ASTs correctly into the library compilation.

title: make anonymous test pass
description: The `anonymous.test.fidl` golden test currently fails when uncommented in `generate-goldens.sh`. Implement support for anonymous inline layouts (structs, unions, etc) inside fidlcrs.

title: Port canonical_names_tests.cc to Rust
description: Port fidlc/tests/canonical_names_tests.cc to src/canonical_names_tests.rs. When ported, failing tests can be marked with #[ignore].

title: Implement compile-time checks for recursive types and vectors
description: Port validation logic for recursive structs (e.g. infinite size checks) and vector layout constraints (similar to arrays). Un-ignore relevant tests in structs_tests.rs.

title: Port direct_dependencies_tests.cc to Rust
description: Port fidlc/tests/direct_dependencies_tests.cc to src/direct_dependencies_tests.rs. When ported, failing tests can be marked with `#[ignore]`.

title: Update consume_step and resolve_step for versioning
description: Update consume_step and resolve_step to handle version filtering and validation, mirroring fidlc's implementation.

title: Enable protocols test
description: Uncomment protocols.test.fidl from generate-goldens.sh, run the script and fix any issues

title: Port lint_tests.cc to Rust
description: Port fidlc/tests/lint_tests.cc to src/lint_tests.rs. When the tests are ported, if they don't pass they can be marked `#[ignore]` to skip.

title: Port library_tests.cc to Rust
description: Port fidlc/tests/library_tests.cc to src/library_tests.rs. When the tests are ported, if they don't pass they can be marked `#[ignore]` to skip.

title: Implement compile-time type checks for constant declarations
description: Currently many tests in consts_tests.rs are ignored because fidlcrs does not enforce type validation on constant assignments (e.g., bool assigned to string, numeric overflow, out of bounds integer conversions, incompatible types for OR operator, missing dependencies). These compiler diagnostics should be implemented.

title: Fix ignored tests in canonical_names_tests.rs
description: Fix the recently ported tests in src/canonical_names_tests.rs that are currently marked with `#[ignore]`.
